rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"The codebase uses kebab-case for utility files (e.g. format-date.ts), so dateUtils.ts was flagged as an exception.","scope":"file naming"},{"kind":"decision","text":"When an existing file already implements the exact feature (format-date.ts), the plan chose to create new files as specified rather than modify or alias the existing one, to match task scope.","scope":"src/utils"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Existing tests in the codebase use vi.useFakeTimers() from vitest for time-based utilities; reuse this pattern for date formatting tests.","scope":"testing"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The pipeline expected 4 stages and PR creation; the plan stage must confirm complexity=LOW before proceeding to build.","scope":"pipeline"}]}
